name: IRC_BC_ACTIVATION_CONFIG
description: Stores activation configuration for background check partners for recruiting.

columns.Name: CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: SHARE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether BC results can be shared across submissions

columns.Name: VALIDITY_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Previous BC result can be reused only if it is not older than this value.

columns.Name: CAPTURE_PII_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether partner can be post  pii data  for submissions

columns.Name: SEND_PII_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether candidate pii data can be shared to patner.

columns.Name: PACKAGE_SELECTION_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether background check package selection allowed or not.

columns.Name: MULTIPLE_REQUEST_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether background check will be enabled for multiple requests

columns.Name: CSS_LINK_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores the flag indicating whether the backgroundCheck link will be displayed on the candidate self service page for process triggers.

columns.Name: OVERDUE_ALERT
columns.Comments: Stores the number of days past request date when the BC results are due

columns.Name: CLIENT_ID
columns.Comments: oAuth Client ID provided by the partner is stored in this column.

columns.Name: CLIENT_SECRET
columns.Comments: oAuth Client Secret provided by the partner is stored in this column.

columns.Name: RESULTS_FLEX_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Store the Job Application EFF context code for additional Background check Results

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
